title: Cobblemon Shiny Sparkles
description: Tired of shinies despawning before you get to them? Or other players getting to yours before you do? Behold, Shiny Sparkles! When a shiny spawns for you, it will get caught in a Shiny Sparkle block, which can only be opened by you.
body: Tired of shinies despawning before you get to them? Or other players getting to yours before you do? Behold, Shiny Sparkles! When a shiny spawns for you, it will get caught in a Shiny Sparkle block, which can only be opened by you.
